testimonials.quote: Ridge & Rail completely transformed our kitchen. The team was professional from day one — they showed up on time, kept the site clean, and finished two days ahead of schedule. The quality is exceptional.

We wanted a deck we could actually use year-round. Jake's crew built exactly what we envisioned — beautiful composite decking, a pergola for shade, and cable rail that doesn't block the view. Couldn't be happier.
Our master bathroom looks like something out of a magazine now. They handled everything — demo, plumbing, tile, fixtures. No surprises on price, no cut corners. This is who you call.
They turned our storage basement into an actual living space. The framing, drywall, flooring, and recessed lighting are all top-notch. Our kids basically live down there now.
Very punctual and great at returning calls!
There were a few delays but it turned out exactly how I envisioned. Thanks Whit!
